title: The Nuclear Decommissioning Authority mission progress report 2025
body: "The Mission Progress Report 2024 to 2025 outlines the progress of the NDA’s mission to decommission the UK’s early nuclear sites safely, securely, and cost-effectively. The report aligns with the our strategy and focuses on our four driving themes: Spent Fuels, Nuclear Materials, Integrated Waste Management, and Site Decommissioning and Remediation. ​  The report emphasises the importance of continuous monitoring, adapting to new technologies, and ensuring the safe management of radioactive waste. The NDA’s mission is crucial for supporting the UK’s energy security and achieving carbon net zero goals. ​ "

taxons.title: Radioactive and nuclear substances and waste
